agent_url.description: URL of the persona agent's gateway endpoint (POST /webhook/gateway).

gateway_token.description: Shared secret sent as the X-Gateway-Token header. Leave empty if the agent has no GATEWAY_TOKEN configured.

timeout_s.description: HTTP timeout in seconds for one agent round-trip. The agent simulates human typing delays before answering, so keep this generous.

excluded_platforms.description: Platform adapter names that must NOT be forwarded. Keep aiocqhttp here when NapCat already feeds the agent directly, otherwise QQ messages would be handled twice.

group_whitelist.description: Group IDs to forward. An empty list forwards all groups.

private_enabled.description: Forward private (direct) messages to the agent.

private_whitelist.description: Sender IDs allowed in private chat. An empty list allows all senders (when private_enabled is on).

block_default.description: Stop the AstrBot pipeline after forwarding so the built-in LLM never double-replies in conversations owned by the agent.
